attacking_style: Classification-focused aggression targeting KOM points via solo bridging efforts mid-climb, typically on Cat 2 or harder climbs. Abandons breakaway companions once classification objectives secured rather than pursuing stage victory.
team_tactics: Deployed in controlled breakaways to defend team leader's jersey (polka dots for Evenepoel), willing to sacrifice personal stage ambitions for team classification objectives.
terrain_preference: Mountain stages with multiple categorized climbs where KOM points are available. Strong enough to bridge significant gaps (1+ minute) solo mid-climb when motivated by classification hunting.
vulnerability: Descending technical skills appear questionable (puncture incident on descent while leading). Stage win ambition secondary to points gathering makes him predictable in breakaway finales.
key_patterns: Solo bridges gaps mid-climb specifically for KOM points, not stage wins (2 observations)
Prioritizes classification jerseys over breakaway companion loyalty and stage hunting (2+ observations)
Effective controlled breakaway domestique for defending team leader's polka dot jersey (2 observations)
Abandons strong positions once classification objectives met rather than contesting stage (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Strong climbing form evident in solo bridging efforts and breakaway strength, but mechanical issues and tactical choices prevent converting into stage results
built_from: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 3
